tasks.title: Scaffold FastAPI app and routers
tasks.description: Create app.py with a FastAPI instance and an empty /todos router.

tasks.title: Implement GET /todos
tasks.description: Return the module-level todos list as JSON.

tasks.title: Implement POST /todos
tasks.description: Accept JSON {text:string}, append with server-generated id.

tasks.title: Implement DELETE /todos/{id}
tasks.description: Remove todo by id; 404 if missing.
